name: Archery Center
description: Archery Center is a place to play pickleball in Yankton, SD. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pierson Ranch
description: Pierson Ranch is a place to play pickleball in Yankton, SD. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Westside Park, Yankton
description: Come play pickleball at Westside Park, Yankton in Yankton, SD! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Yankton City Hall
description: Come play pickleball at Yankton City Hall in Yankton, SD! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private. Amenities include lights and restrooms.
